bullets: Address: 106-5 Sakugumi, Shichinohe, Kamikita District, Aomori 039-2568, Japan
Access: Approx. 11 minutes by car from JR Shichinohe-Towada Station / Michi-no-Eki Shichinohe (Tabikura facility page)
Parking: Free (approx. 300 spaces per local guides — confirm on the official site)
Hours: Day 9:00–16:00 (last lift 15:40) / Night 17:00–21:00 (no night skiing Sundays)

faq.notice: Content may change. Also check Today's operations & snow and the map for the latest status.

items.question: What is the nearest station?
items.answer: JR Shichinohe-Towada Station. Approx. 11 minutes by car from the station or Michi-no-Eki Shichinohe (Tabikura facility page).

items.question: Is there parking?
items.answer: Free parking is available (approx. 300 spaces per local guides). Winter road conditions can affect access.

items.question: Where can I buy lift tickets?
items.answer: At the ticket window during the season. Day tickets: adult ¥2,500, child/junior high ¥1,500 — see Tickets & rental for the full list.

items.question: Are preschool children free?
items.answer: Yes — preschool children ride lifts free (Tabikura lift fares).

items.question: What are the opening hours?
items.answer: Day skiing 9:00–16:00 (last lift 15:40). Night skiing 17:00–21:00 (closed Sunday nights). Closed every Monday.

items.question: Can the resort close for bad weather?
items.answer: High wind, poor visibility, or snow conditions may cause lift stoppages or trail closures. Check operations before you travel.
